text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask Trainer Kiryuin to join me for a day out and
about, and she accepts. The two of us are idly
walking around, when...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh, what's this?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
No good! Give it more heart, and put your back
into it!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Y-yeah... I'll try again!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
She's working hard... but as far as the trainer's
advice goes...
choice_data_list: It's not just about spirit and guts, right?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
That's right. As the Trainer's Handbook says:
"Motivation and willpower only have meaning
when paired with proper technique."

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Still, I can't interfere with his training metho—

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! Get a hold of yourself! This next race is
my last chance!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Trainer. Sorry to interrupt you in the
middle of your work.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Trainer Kiryuin?!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind explaining to me what you just
said? What do you mean by "last chance?"

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
W-well, not that it's any of your business, but...
my evaluation scores are falling because of her
race results!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
If my contract with Tracen Academy is
terminated, my career—

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
You are a trainer who should be guiding
Umamusume towards their dreams, not placing
your burdens on them!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: What are you—

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
You say this is your final chance? Give me a
break!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
A trainer should not force their own dreams upon
their racers.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Racing is a once in a lifetime opportunity that
greatly influences the rest of their lives.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: That's why we're here—in order to guide them.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: We are the ones who take responsibility for them, not the other way around!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Th-that's...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
If you call yourself a trainer, then do your part to
support your trainee's dreams!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
As long as you continue to chase those dreams
together, there should be no "last chances."

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Even for you.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry you had to witness that. I acted rashly.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: But... I couldn't just stand by and remain silent.
choice_data_list:
No apologies needed. You taught me an
important lesson.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: What?! H-hardly!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
You already knew all that, didn't you,
Trainer <username>?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I can tell just by looking at you. You put your
Umamusume's needs above all else.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
...That being said, it's an honor to hear you say
that.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Being recognized by someone I believe in warms
my heart greatly.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Oh! Y-yes! Uh... I didn't mean for it to
sound weird or anything.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
What I mean is, I believe in you as a peer, as a
fellow trainer, and as a friend!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Of course, it doesn't have to be only that. For
instance, being able to talk like this is a si—

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Ah... E-excuse me. Please forget I said anything...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Trainer Kiryuin has a lot of faith in
me.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It's no big deal, really. Yelling like that is proof
that I'm still immature emotionally.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I can't keep doing that. For Meek's sake as well, I
need to keep growing...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I should apologize to that trainer as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Trainer Kiryuin's sincerity will reach
whoever she's speaking to, even the trainer
before.
